briefdescription.para: Build and send an SNTP request on an already-open socket.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK if sent, SYN_ERROR on failure.

briefdescription.para: Parse an SNTP response packet and extract the transmit timestamp.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_BUSY if packet too short, SYN_ERROR on invalid response.

briefdescription.para: Read a big-endian uint32 from a byte buffer.
Perform a single blocking NTP query.

detaileddescription.para: Opens a UDP socket, sends a request, waits for the response, and updates the internal epoch. Closes the socket when done.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_TIMEOUT or SYN_ERROR on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get current UTC epoch in seconds.

detaileddescription.para: Computed as: last_sync_epoch + (current_tick - sync_tick) / 1000. Returns 0 if not yet synced.

simplesect.para: Current epoch seconds, or 0 if unsynced.

briefdescription.para: Get current nanosecond component of the timestamp.

detaileddescription.para: Derived from the tick counter sub-second remainder + NTP fractional seconds from the last sync. Approximate — not sub-ms accurate.

briefdescription.para: Get the calculated hardware clock drift in Parts-Per-Million (PPM).

detaileddescription.para: Calculated automatically on subsequent NTP syncs by comparing network time elapsed against local hardware timer elapsed.

simplesect.para: Calculated drift in PPM (+ = local clock runs fast, - = slow).

briefdescription.para: Non-blocking receive: try to read an NTP response.

detaileddescription.para: Calls recvfrom with timeout_ms = 0 (non-blocking). If a valid response is available, parses it and sets sntp->synced = true.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK if synced, SYN_BUSY if no data yet, SYN_ERROR on bad response.

briefdescription.para: Cooperative protothread task for periodic NTP sync.

detaileddescription.para: Syncs on startup, then re-syncs every sync_interval_s seconds. Pass the SYN_SNTP context via task->user_data.
